ksa_text: Knowledge of data quality management program design, including profiling methodologies, rule authoring standards, quality threshold setting, issue classification and prioritization, escalation path design, and continuous improvement cycles.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of functionality, quality, and security requirements and how these will apply to specific items of supply (i.e., elements and processes).

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-004 (Data Quality/Knowledge) scores 0.451 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.451) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Administrator role. Domain prior: in_scope. Core signal hits: 3. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for specialist-level ISO 8000 Data Administrator.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with in_scope scope, EU AI Act signal (0.451), and Data Quality handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in 50-80% of ISO 8000 Data Administrator job postings. KSA content aligns with hiring criteria at specialist level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality at composite 0.451 is market-validated for ISO 8000 Data Administrator. Final decision: include.
